projectDescription: An iOS and macOS decompiler built on Ghidra that supports Swift, Objective-C, and Apple resource decoding with built-in LLM-assisted analysis.
keyFeatures: Decompiles IPA files and macOS Application Bundles
Built on Ghidra for Swift and Objective-C support
Auto-decodes iOS resources (plists, assets, provisioning profiles)
Reconstructs Swift class hierarchies from mangled symbols
Built-in LLM method translation (OpenAI, local models)
AI-powered vulnerability analysis and code summarization
Library filtering to skip known Apple framework code
Universal Mach-O binary support with architecture selection
SQLite-backed project persistence with recent projects
publicApiSurface: AnalysisWindow.show(File file, Config config) — open analysis view
AIBackend.sendToModel(provider, modelId, inputText, config) — LLM query
SQLiteDBHandler — project database (classes, functions, strings, references)
